content_lint.name: no_template_field_brackets
content_lint.forbid: \[(Action name|Process Name|Input|Format|Step #|The question|Person / agent|Frequency|Unknown, and who could answer it|Who runs it today|Quick / Deep|Steps|Operator)\]

content_lint.name: no_design_narration
content_lint.forbid: (the interview\b|in this session|this session (the|surfaced|covered)|the operator (first|initially|then) (said|stated|described|mentioned|proposed)|during (the|this) (design session|interview session))
